g.title: authority.record_entry:control_set->authority.control_set:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (control_set) REFERENCES authority.control_set(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: authority.record_note:record->authority.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (record) REFERENCES authority.record_entry(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: metabib.browse_entry_def_map:authority->authority.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (authority) REFERENCES authority.record_entry(id) ON DELETE SET NULL

g.title: vandelay.authority_match:eg_record->authority.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (eg_record) REFERENCES authority.record_entry(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.queued_authority_record:imported_as->authority.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (imported_as) REFERENCES authority.record_entry(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
